packageRules.description: Group all GitHub Actions bumps into one PR. build.zig.zon declares no dependencies, so there is no Zig package manifest for Renovate to manage; only GitHub Actions, the devcontainer base image, and the pinned Zig toolchain are version-managed.

customManagers.description: Track the pinned Zig toolchain (ARG ZIG_VERSION) in the devcontainer Dockerfile; the same version drives the CI toolchain and the matching ZLS build.
